titles.text: Hyouryuu Ki - The Reportage Beyond the Sea
漂流記 - The Reportage Beyond The Sea

roms.name: Hyouryuu Ki - The Reportage Beyond the Sea (Japan)

descriptions.text: Hyouryuu Ki: The Reportage Beyond the Sea begins when a plane crashes on an island. The player must explore the island to find materials to build new items and machines, while keeping the other characters alive by providing them food and water. There are different endings depending of what is build or used to escape the island.
A plane crashes into the sea, but the protagonist survives and reaches a seemingly deserted island. He teams up with other survivors and explores the island.
